reviews.review_title: Wonderful, keep up the good work!!!!:
reviews.review_description: Very good game. I love the physics and the shop, I'm just disappointed the shop doesn't work and servers may be broken but I'm not sure. Overall I love it and please fix the shop 😀 discord server may be nice too, I would promote this on every discord I'm in! I'm not a bot BTW jus autocorrect

Try this game out. It is probably the closest fan game to Gorilla Tag. 

When I first played I was glad to find that there was not tutorial(because a lot of the time it is actually a nuisance)

The physics are good, except my hands kept going under the map if I moved them too fast.

I would take down the other version of the game because it confused me and the servers are broken.

The shop has the release badge as of right now and I’m kind of disappointed that the shop is not working.

Of course the game is in early access, so there will be bugs, but I look forward to the future updates that this game will contain.

Inside the game my name is Mossy, and my color code is 224.

Thank you developers!
